code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut sorted = true
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut val = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
  if is_digit
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    end
    val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if (b == 45 or b == 43) and not in_num
    in_num = true
    if b == 45
      sign = -1
    else
      sign = 1
    end
    val = 0
  else
    if in_num
      let num = sign * val
      if has_prev and num < prev
        sorted = false
      end
      prev = num
      has_prev = true
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let num = sign * val
  if has_prev and num < prev
    sorted = false
  end
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
